Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: chunk long transcripts for summarization, use polling for summary jobs

Groq free tier limits Llama to 12k TPM. Long transcripts (32k+ tokens)
now get split into chunks, each summarized separately with 65s waits
between calls, then merged into a final summary.

Summarize endpoint also converted to background job + polling to avoid
Cloudflare timeouts during the multi-minute chunked summarization.

Add STR tax savings calculator and dev server launch config

- Add str_tax_calculator.py: interactive Python tool that estimates
  Year-1 tax savings for W2 earners purchasing a short-term rental,
  including bonus/turbo depreciation via cost segregation, W2 income
  offset analysis, federal bracket math, state tax savings, and cash
  flow snapshot. Saves a detailed text report to the Desktop.

  http.server on port 3000) for previewing game1.html locally.

All tiers tracked: client-side rescue stats in Stats screen (wiki/ddg/web/miss
counts + cost estimate), server-side rescue analytics in /stats dashboard
(daily breakdown, recent searches, found/miss badges, running cost).

NE: persist _analyzed (cooldown/dedup) across restarts

Saves market_id → (timestamp, news_hash) alongside shadow state so
cooldown and news dedup survive deploys. Prevents duplicate signals
(e.g. Paxton/Tô Lâm re-signaling immediately after restart).

Restore log now includes analyzed count for verification.

fix: コード品質チェック - セキュリティ強化とバグ修正

【重大問題の修正】
- Turnstile APIのネットワークエラーハンドリング追加
  - API障害時に全認証停止するのを防止
  - エラー時はlogを記録してfalseを返す
- SQL LIKE検索でのワイルドカード（%、_）エスケープ
  - ユーザー入力の特殊文字がLIKEパターンとして解釈される問題を修正
  - admin.pyでの対応漏れを解消

【改善】
- JWTタイムスタンプの一貫性確保
  - datetime.now()の二重呼び出しをiatとexpで統一
- 未使用インポート削除、重複インポート統合
  - user_books.py: generate_signed_urlの削除、app.utils.response統合
- purchase_priceへのバリデーション追加
  - 負の値を拒否するように0以上の制約を追加
- STATUS_OPTIONSに"suspended"を追加
  - バックエンド・ラベルとの不整合を解消
- BookSearchResultResponse構築の簡潔化
  - 手動フィールドコピーをdataclasses.asdict()に置換
  - _book_to_responseエイリアスを削除
- UIコンポーネント統合
  - ローカルLabel定義削除、既存UIコンポーネント利用
- レートリミットテスト更新
  - 古いpipelineモックをLuaスクリプト方式に対応

【テスト結果】
✅ 全160テスト通過
✅ TypeScript型チェック通過

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Speed up e2e tests by blocking ONNX model downloads and removing blind waits (#367)

- Add shared Playwright fixture (e2e/fixtures.ts) that intercepts /models/*.onnx
  requests with empty 200 responses, preventing ~50 MB of ONNX classification
  model downloads on every test that uploads audio. The classification test keeps
  using @playwright/test directly so it still tests real model loading.
- Replace waitForTimeout(3000) in recording tests with DOM-based polling
  (expect .timeline__track count), cutting ~2s per recording test.
- Reduce recording duration from 2s to 1s (sufficient for capturing audio).
- Reduce spectrogram coverage scan from 20 to 10 steps (still validates
  coverage across the full scroll range).
- Poll for canvas content with toPass() instead of one-shot check to handle
  async spectrogram rendering after track creation.

Total e2e suite time: ~50s → ~34s (32% faster).

Add inline service CTAs throughout blog posts

Subtle underlined links within article content where specific services

"Book plumbing repairs →"). All link to the quote intake form. Updated
the content renderer to support [text](url) inline link syntax.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix OpenHands jupyter crash: monkey-patch CodeActAgent.sandbox_plugins

The [sandbox] plugins TOML config doesn't exist in OH v1.4.0 (crashes
with pydantic extra_forbidden). The [core] enable_jupyter also has no
effect on plugin loading. The real control is CodeActAgent.sandbox_plugins
which is a property that checks self.config.enable_jupyter.

Fix: inject a monkey-patch into oh_main_wrapper.py that overrides the
sandbox_plugins property to filter out JupyterRequirement before
OpenHands starts the LocalRuntime action execution server.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix VSR LV shoe detail: rename slug in seed_data.json

The seed_data.json still had the old scarpa-instinct-vsr-womens slug
while the DB was updated to scarpa-instinct-vsr-lv. The SEED_MAP filter
in main.jsx line 405 excluded DB-only shoes, causing 'shoe not found'
on the detail page.

Also swapped Millet Siurana Evo W for Unparallel Sirius LV in scan
recommendations (DB update, not in this commit).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix local LLM mode, add status bar + mode switching (v0.4.0)

Root cause: llama3.2:3b produced malformed JSON (missing quotes on
string values), causing silent JSON.parse failures in the hook script.
The hook fell through to continue:true every time.

Fixes:
- Add response_format: {type: 'json_object'} to local LLM requests
- Add safeParseJson() fallback that extracts {...} from malformed text
- Add API result logging to debug log (success: true/false)
- Increase hook timeout from 5s to 10s for cold starts
- Debounce onDidChangeConfiguration to prevent race conditions
- Remove promptEnhancer.enabled setting (use Switch Mode instead)
- Add status bar indicator (Claude/Local LLM/Disabled)

commit.message:
Auto-detect currency decimal places from input

Track decimal digits in tryParseNumber and set decimalPlaces on currency
cells based on what the user typed: $500 -> 0 decimals, $500.75 -> 2
decimals. Any decimal input clamps to 2 for currency. Full double
precision is always preserved in the cell value.

commit.message:
Use likelihood-only argmax for DPMM cluster assignment diagnostic

MAP assignment (log_probs + log_weights) collapses everything to cluster 0
due to skewed stick-breaking prior weights dominating when log-likelihood
differences are small. Likelihood-only argmax is more informative for
diagnosing whether centroids are geometrically well-separated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: feed mobile layout — stories overlap, button collision, spacing

- Add paddingTop to TrendingStories so it clears the FilterBar

- Fixes cut-off deal circles and button overlap on mobile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix O/U regressor training-inference feature mismatch in NCAA model

build_ou_training_features() was hard-coding off_rtg/def_rtg/pace at
league averages (105/100/70) for every training sample, creating zero
variance in 6 of 8 features. At inference time those same features get
real win%-derived values, making the Ridge regressor effectively a 2-feature
model applied to 8-feature inputs.

Fix: derive off_rtg, def_rtg, and pace from win_pct in the training loop
using the same linear scaling already used for ppg (via _estimate_stats):
  off_rtg = 105 ± 7.5  (win_pct range 0–1)
  def_rtg = 100 ∓ 6
  pace    = 70  ± 3

Deletes ~/.ncaa_model_weights.pkl to force retrain on next startup.

commit.message:
sec2: restore i'_n (load current) through full derivation

Carry i'_n through all equations to match paper's Eq.9 general form:
- physbox: remove hard EMI-approx claim; say paper carries i'_n for generality
- Step 3 cap: use (i_n - i'_n)/(pC_n) with EMI note
- Step 4 KVL / eq:KVL_one: (R+pL)·i_n + (i_n-i'_n)/(pC_n); label "Eq.9 in paper"
- Step 5 elastance: (R+pL)·i_n + (S_n/p)·(i_n - i'_n)
- Step 7: add i' vector; eq:MMeqn now (R+pL)i + (1/p)S_N(i-i') = v_nP + v_Pg·1_N
- statebox: Z=... equivalence shown as optional rearrangement
- DCM derivation: substitute i' = (TiN)^{-1}·i'_DCM; display eq shows S_DCM
- eq:DCMeqn: Z_DCM·iDCM = vDCM + v_Pg·eN + (1/p)·S_DCM·i'_DCM with EMI note

repository.description: `ospgrillage` is a package that wraps `OpenSeesPy` with an interface dedicated to the development and analysis of regular bridge deck grillage models.
